title: PvP Sora
description: A PVP Resource Pack that WILL improve your skill level!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/505ac798ea0e83f77b67a884250ce8a2c0a2bbf4.png) **PvPSora** is a PVP resource pack that will elevate your PVP skills to the next level. Head over to the **Gallery** section for example images of this pack! # Features - *Changes many textures to enhance your experience while participating in PVP combat* # Changed Items
Changed Items/Entities/other Arrow, Bow, CrossBow, Diamond Tools, Diamond Armor, Elytra, EnderPearl, XP Bottle, FireBall, FishingRod, Golden apple, Golden Carrot, Gold Tools, Gold armor, Iron Tools, Iron Armor, Lava Bucket, Water Bucket, Bucket, Mace, Netherite Tools, Netherite Armor, Shears, SnowBall, Stone Tools, Totem, Trident, Wood tools, shield, Crystals, all Gui's
# Installation PvPSora is compatible with Minecraft **1.6.x, 1.7.x, 1.8.x**, and **1.20.4 up to 1.21.8**. You can install it through the Modrinth app, or manually added to your resource pack folder.
Videos
# Support / Credits [](https://membercat.com) This project is part of **Membercat Studios** by **KasaiSora** and has been created by: - **bug_finder**: Artist - **Ali**: Artist To report an issue, receive support, or give your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
